% ppart-bank.tex -- two free-response problems with \ppart parts, for the
% part-atomicity check.  Under \shuffle the two problems may swap order, but each
% problem's parts must stay CONTIGUOUS beneath it and keep their authored a/b/c
% sub-order (pbank_inject_part, problem_engine.lua) -- a part must never leak to
% the neighbouring problem or come out mis-lettered.
\begin{problem}{pone}[topic=fr]
	PONESTEM first problem.
	\begin{parts}
		\ppart PONEPARTA alpha work.
		\ppart PONEPARTB bravo work.
		\ppart PONEPARTC charlie work.
	\end{parts}
\end{problem}
\begin{problem}{ptwo}[topic=fr]
	PTWOSTEM second problem.
	\begin{parts}
		\ppart PTWOPARTA delta work.
		\ppart PTWOPARTB echo work.
	\end{parts}
\end{problem}
